decontamination_notes: Real fix from python/mypy PR #21456, merged 2026-05 (after model training cutoffs). Extends literal narrowing inside membership tests to cover list literals (not just tuples), in mypy's conditional type-narrowing logic (checker.py). Graded on two independent literal element types (str, int) with tuple narrowing as a no-regression check. The narrowest of this batch's very-hard tasks. Repo sliced at base commit (mypy/ incl. typeshed subtree, 128k LOC); MIT LICENSE preserved. Runs in the shared mypy per-task image vulcanbench/sandbox:mypy-21544; the workspace mypy runs interpreted via PYTHONPATH=. as a subprocess on test snippets.
